message.content: @startuml actor "CenterCoordinator" as CenterCoordinator participant ":DataFromLegacySystemUI" as DataFromLegacySystemUI participant ":DataFromLegacySystemController" as DataFromLegacySystemController database ".ReadLegacyDataFile" as ReadLegacyDataFile entity :Company as Company control SNSUserStore as SNSUserStore boundary App as App interface VaccinationCenter as VaccinationCenter object Arrival as Arrival object Departure as Departure database vaccinationCentersStore as vaccinationCentersStore == 1 Asks to load a CSV file with legacy data == 2 DataFromLegacySystemController() ->> +DataFromLegacySystemController: 3 getVaccinationCentersStore() ->>+vaccinationCentersStore: 4 returns the store -->-DataFromLegacySystemController: 5 getVaccinationCenterAssociatedToCoordinatior(id) ->+App:+VaccinationCenter: 6 returns the vacation center -->DataFromLegacySystemController: 7 readLegacyDatafile(center)->>+ReadLegacyDataFile: 8 request path of the CSV file-->+CenterCoordinator: 9 types path-->>+DataFromLegacySystemUI: 10 readFile(path)-->>+DataFromLegacySystemController: loop while csv has new lines note right #ffcccc while\ncvs has new lines\n<\i>: validateFileLegacys(SNSI,userNumber,\nfirstDate,secondDate,thirdDate,fourthDate)\nSaves data into an ArrayList
